description_long: This object is a modern, sleek mobile phone with a glossy black exterior and a large, edge-to-edge display on the front. The front screen features a vibrant, abstract wallpaper with pink and orange hues, and a small centered front-facing camera at the top. The back of the phone is minimalist, with a dual or triple camera array vertically aligned in the top left corner and no visible branding. The sides are thin and smooth, with subtle buttons likely for power and volume control. The phone's construction appears to be primarily glass and metal, giving it a premium look and feel. Its overall design is slim, rectangular, and highly reflective, typical of contemporary smartphones.
description: A slim, glossy black smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display and a minimalist back featuring a vertical camera array. The front screen shows a colorful abstract wallpaper.
description_view_0: The back of the phone is visible, showing a glossy black surface with a vertical camera array in the top left corner and no visible branding.
description_view_1: The left edge of the phone is shown, appearing very thin with no visible buttons or features.
description_view_2: The front of the phone is displayed, featuring a large screen with a vibrant abstract wallpaper and a small centered front-facing camera.
description_view_3: The right edge of the phone is shown, also thin, with subtle indications of possible button placements.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with pink and orange swirling shapes and no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two or three camera lenses vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back of the phone, slightly raised from the surface.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are subtly indicated on the right edge, likely including a power button and volume rocker.
